response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack development experience and a strong background in C/C++ (used in LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments), but his recent roles have focused heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and other languages, with limited evidence of recent C++ work in industrial automation or high-performance systems. His security expertise is not clearly demonstrated, and his exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) or industrial protocols is minimal. While he has architectural and mentorship experience, the alignment with this role's core requirements is weak.
strengths: Strong foundational knowledge of C/C++ from prior roles (e.g., National Instruments)
Extensive experience with software architecture, testing, and CI/CD practices
Demonstrated ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, particularly in high-performance or industrial automation contexts
No clear evidence of IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle (SDL) experience
Minimal exposure to cloud platforms (Azure) or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) critical for this role
